scenarios.name: Simple Appointment Scheduling
scenarios.persona: Sarah Johnson, 34, needs to schedule a routine checkup
scenarios.goal: Schedule an appointment for next week
scenarios.opening: Hi, I'd like to schedule an appointment for a routine checkup please.

scenarios.name: Reschedule Appointment
scenarios.persona: Mike Chen, 45, has a conflict with his existing appointment
scenarios.opening: Hello, I need to reschedule my appointment that's currently set for Tuesday.

scenarios.name: Cancel Appointment
scenarios.persona: Lisa Rodriguez, 28, needs to cancel due to work travel
scenarios.opening: Hi, I need to cancel my appointment for this Friday.

scenarios.name: Medication Refill
scenarios.persona: Robert Williams, 62, needs blood pressure medication refill
scenarios.opening: Hello, I'm calling to request a refill on my blood pressure medication, Lisinopril.

scenarios.name: Office Hours Question
scenarios.persona: Emma Davis, 38, wants to know weekend availability
scenarios.goal: Find out if office is open on weekends
scenarios.opening: Hi, I was wondering if you're open on Saturdays or Sundays?

scenarios.name: Insurance Question
scenarios.persona: David Brown, 55, checking if insurance is accepted
scenarios.goal: Verify if Blue Cross Blue Shield is accepted
scenarios.opening: Hello, do you accept Blue Cross Blue Shield insurance?

scenarios.name: Location Question
scenarios.goal: Get the office address and parking information
scenarios.opening: Hi, I'm a new patient and I need your address and parking information.

scenarios.name: Edge Case - Sunday Appointment
scenarios.persona: Tom Wilson, 42, tries to book on Sunday
scenarios.goal: Try to schedule for Sunday morning
scenarios.opening: Hi, can I schedule an appointment for this Sunday at 10am?

scenarios.name: Edge Case - Interruption
scenarios.opening: Hi, I need to schedule... hold on... sorry, I need to schedule an appointment.

scenarios.name: Edge Case - Unclear Request
scenarios.goal: Make an unclear request to test agent clarification
scenarios.opening: Hi, um, I think I might need to do something about my thing... the appointment or whatever.

scenarios.name: Urgent Appointment
scenarios.persona: Amanda Green, 29, needs urgent same-day appointment
scenarios.goal: Get an urgent same-day appointment for flu symptoms
scenarios.opening: Hi, I'm feeling really sick and need to see a doctor today if possible.

scenarios.name: New Patient Registration
scenarios.persona: Kevin White, 40, new to the practice
scenarios.goal: Register as a new patient and schedule first visit
scenarios.opening: Hello, I'm looking to become a new patient at your practice.
